challenge.excerptFallback: Practice prompt design against this seeded Prompteer challenge.

home.topDescription: Practice prompt design across algorithm, image, and video challenges using the rebuilt FastAPI backend.

algorithm.title: Algorithm
algorithm.description: Algorithm prompts, solution reasoning, and output critique.

image.title: Image
image.description: Visual prompt structure with image-specific backend feedback.

video.title: Video
video.description: Scene, motion, timing, and consistency prompt feedback.

preparing.title: Preparing
preparing.description: Additional legacy categories are staged for future API coverage.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: The legacy preview uses the primary Prompteer web app as the Auth.js gateway. Demo buttons bridge through that app and return here.

signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Account creation is owned by the primary Auth.js app in the rebuilt architecture. Use demo login locally or configure real Google OAuth.

image.title: Image Challenges
image.description: Visual prompt practice with the rebuilt challenge API and deterministic feedback.

video.title: Video Challenges
video.description: Motion and scene prompts use the same backend challenge runner while keeping the legacy video-card treatment.

preparing.title: Preparing
preparing.description: This legacy category shell is ready for future backend coverage.

board.title: Board
board.description: Shared questions and prompt runs from the rebuilt community API.

write.title: Write post
write.description: The legacy write surface is present; write APIs are not exposed yet.
write.contentValue: Board creation will be wired once the rebuilt API exposes mutation endpoints for community posts.

detail.postNotFoundDescription: This legacy board post is no longer available from the community detail API.
detail.shareNotFoundDescription: This shared prompt may be private or no longer available from the community detail API.
detail.emptyPostBody: This post does not include additional body text.
detail.emptyPromptBody: This shared run does not include prompt text.

problem.title: Problem detail
problem.description: Problem detail shell for board post {postId}.
problem.body: Challenge problem pages are available from each category. Board-linked problem details need a dedicated board-detail API before they can show authoritative data.

billing.title: Subscription checkout
billing.description: Stripe-compatible billing flow in the legacy settings layout.

panel.planDescription: Start and complete a Stripe-shaped checkout while preserving the old settings-style panel layout.
panel.checkoutDescription: Local mock sessions complete in-app. Real Stripe sessions return a hosted URL from the API.
panel.loginCallout: Sign in to view subscription state and start checkout.

myPage.title: My page
myPage.description: Account, participation, and mock integration status.
myPage.signedOut: Sign in through the primary web app.
myPage.integrationDescription: Blank credentials keep local development on deterministic mocks.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Legacy sidebar settings layout backed by the rebuilt runtime config.

runner.publishToBoard: Publish this run to the board
runner.loginCallout: Sign in before running prompts. The legacy preview will reuse the primary Prompteer Auth.js session through the gateway.
runner.featureDisabled: Prompt runs are disabled by feature flag.
runner.referenceCount: {count, plural, =0 {No references} one {# reference} other {# references}}
runner.emptyOutput: Run a prompt to receive deterministic feedback from the rebuilt backend.

defaultPrompts.coding: Explain the problem constraints first, then produce a concise solution plan and implementation.
defaultPrompts.image: Describe the visual goal, composition, key objects, lighting, style, and constraints.
defaultPrompts.video: Describe the scene, camera movement, timing, subject action, and visual consistency rules.

helpers.coding: Coding challenges run through the LLM mock or configured provider and can publish prompt shares.
helpers.image: Image challenges currently use the shared LLM feedback endpoint; media generation is intentionally not promised by this preview.
helpers.video: Video challenges currently use prompt feedback with video-specific framing, not generated video output.

runner.excerptFallback: Practice prompt design against this seeded Prompteer challenge.

errors.unauthorized: Sign in through the primary Prompteer login, then try again.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: The legacy preview could not render this page.
errors.appDescription: The legacy preview could not render this page.
errors.authDescription: The legacy preview could not render this sign-in page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This legacy preview route is not available yet.
